name: dev.ucp.shopping.fee
title: Fee Extension
description: Extends Checkout and Cart with itemized fee support, enabling businesses to surface service fees, handling charges, regulatory fees, and other surcharges.

fees_object.description: Container for itemized fees applied to the order.

applied.description: Fees applied to this checkout or cart. Business-determined; not settable by platforms.

dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.title: Checkout with Fees
dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.description: Checkout extended with itemized fee support.

dev.ucp.shopping.cart.title: Cart with Fees
dev.ucp.shopping.cart.description: Cart extended with itemized fee support.
